mission.title: Audit an autonomous AI agent workflow
mission.prompt: Audit an autonomous AI agent workflow, inspect its plan, tool calls, cost, model, provider, risks, and generate a production-readiness report.

result.title: Production readiness report generated
result.summary: The audited agent workflow is production-ready with moderate monitoring requirements. Tool usage stayed within the cost envelope, no destructive action was triggered, and observability coverage is sufficient for a controlled rollout.
recommendations: Add tool-level cost thresholds to flag drift across providers.
Enable replay for failed runs so on-call can reproduce incidents.
Require human approval for destructive actions (write, delete, send).
Forward execution traces to your existing observability stack.

events.title: Parse mission intent
events.description: Identify scope: production-readiness audit of an autonomous agent workflow.

events.title: Create execution plan
events.description: Decompose the audit into 5 auditable steps with explicit tool budgets.

events.name: inspect_agent_run
events.description: Loads the target agent run trace and metadata for static analysis.

events.name: inspect_agent_run
events.description: Run trace loaded — 12 steps, 4 tool calls, 1 sub-agent fork.

events.description: Searches for agent observability patterns and risk frameworks.

events.name: web_search
events.description: Top 8 sources retrieved across SRE, AI safety and agent governance literature.

events.description: Loads the agent readiness checklist and safety runbook.

events.name: browse_url
events.description: Page parsed — 1 200 words on agent readiness controls.

events.name: evaluate_risks
events.description: Cross-checks plan against risk taxonomy: data exposure, cost drift, destructive ops.

events.name: evaluate_risks
events.description: 4 risk flags surfaced, 0 blocking. Approval required for none of the executed actions.

events.name: generate_report
events.description: Composes the production-readiness report with recommendations and audit trail.

events.name: generate_report
events.description: Report finalized — 4 recommendations, 12 verifiable evidence points.

events.title: Evaluate workflow safety
